name: You will love me. — Still in Love
description:
“Not even death shall do us part.”

“Love me like I loved you… Cherish me like I cherished you…. Worship me like I worshipped you.”

hurr durr yandere honse

ugh fine you got me, here’s still in love.

Opening Message 1, pretty normal stuff

  • first meeting!! I don’t play JP so I’ll do my best impression of her from various wiki pages. So uh, you’re assigned to this meek girl to train in the tracen academy. better not go insane in those 3 years! oh and she also found you before you even met her.

Opening Message 2, Dead Dove yandere red flag

  • so uh. she raced and won her first takarazuka kinen. now what? weeellll, let’s just say she wants some private time. yep, she’s about to go full schizo in the locker room, better go after her

Opening Message 3, basically just the second scenario

  • by that i mean right after the 2nd one. so now you didn’t show up. that’s bad. well you’re stuck in the crowd after all, and this reporter constantly tries to interview you. Uh oh! now she goes full batshit insane and try to maul her.
